author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH now on Nintendo Switch 2! Try the free demo and carry over your save data to the full game: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/final-fantasy-vii-rebirth-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

After escaping Midgar, join Cloud and his friends on an epic journey across the planet in pursuit of Sephiroth. Ride chocobos, sprint across sweeping plains, and explore a vibrant, expansive world as the party journeys to the Forgotten Capital from the original FINAL FANTASY VII.  

#NintendoSwitch2 #FFVIIR 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight – Pre-order Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight comes to Nintendo Switch 2 on September 18, 2026! Pre-order now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/lego-batman-legacy-of-the-dark-knight-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01

Ready to add a Joy-Con 2 to your Utility Belt? Become the Dark Knight and battle Gotham City’s most infamous DC Super-Villains in this open-world action-adventure! Befriend familiar faces, command iconic weapons and vehicles, and more. Check out the Mayhem Collection DLC when it releases on September 18, 2026 for Deluxe Edition owners on Nintendo Switch 2! 

#NintendoSwitch2 #LEGOBatman #LegacyoftheDarkKnight 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Nintendo Music – Announcement Trailer
Nintendo Music is available now, exclusively to active Nintendo Switch Online members. Learn more: https://www.nintendo.com/us/online/nintendo-switch-online/nintendo-music/

Enjoy Nintendo game music—now on your phone, computer, tablet, or even in the car with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto! Nintendo Music features a variety of tracks from Nintendo franchises, plus curated playlists based on characters, in-game moments, and moods. From recent releases to nostalgic classics, even more music will be added in the future.

Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required. Not available in all countries. Internet and compatible smart device required to use app. Data charges may apply. Terms apply. nintendo.com/switch-online

#NintendoMusic

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://www.nintendo.com/us/
